mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rate_no AS rateNo, cur_nm AS currencyCode,
CASE WHEN cur_nm LIKE '%(100)' THEN REPLACE(cur_nm, '(100)', '') ELSE cur_nm END AS displayCurrencyCode,
ttb AS ttb, tts AS tts, deal_bas_r AS dealBaseRate,
CASE WHEN cur_nm LIKE '%(100)' THEN 100 ELSE 1 END AS currencyUnit,
ntc_dt AS noticeDate FROM exchange_rates WHERE cur_nm = #{currencyCode} ORDER BY ntc_dt DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
